title: MinePuting
description: A mod that adds computers to minecraft, which interact with chat and commands.
body:
# Mineputing

### **THE TIER 1 MOTHERBOARD DOES NOT WORK. UNTIL IT IS FIXED PLEASE DO NOT USE IT!!**

---

This mod adds computers that can run Minecraft commands or interact with chat. It also adds a general electricity system, which is not yet compatible with the computers. 

## What does this mod add?

This mod adds computers, which may have been given away by the name. These can be programmed in Minecraft Function Programming, also known as commands and chat.
When powered by redstone, the last message/command is repeated.

---

This mod uses the FE (Forge Energy) system.

---
<details>
<summary>Development Info</summary>

To create new motherboards, RAM, CPUs or graphics cards, follow this registry name convention:
|Component    |Registry name|
|--------------:|:--------------|
|Motherboard: |`motherboard_{tier}`|
|RAM:                |`ram_{tier}`    |
|CPU:                 |`cpu_{tier}`|
|GPU:                 |`memory_{tier}`|

If you're using MCreator, it can be named
```
Motherboard{tier}
RAM{tier}
CPU{tier}
Memory{tier}
```

</details>
